topStories.description: Suspicious trades worth billions in S&P 500 and oil futures placed minutes before Trump’s Iran talks announcement have sparked insider trading concerns. dailyNews.description: Stopping GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic quickly erodes heart protection, with two years off the medication raising cardiovascular risk by 22%, a new study finds.

dailyNews.title: Department of Education under Trump just took its 'largest' step closer to shutting down
dailyNews.description: Student loan operations from a nearly $1.7 trillion portfolio are being transferred from the Department of Education to the Treasury under a new interagency agreement.

dailyNews.title: Trump Faces Blowback on Easing Iran Oil Sanctions
dailyNews.description: President Trump once assailed the Obama administration for making cash payments to Iran. Now he supports sanctions relief that could give the country a $14 billion windfall.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Threat to Iran, but War Negotiations Are in Early Stage
dailyNews.description: President Trump postponed his threat to strike power plants in Iran, citing “productive conversations” with the Iranians. But officials said the talks were in an early stage and not substantive.

dailyNews.title: ‘What If Donald Shouts at Me?’ Trump Sours on British Leader Over Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump once called Prime Minister Keir Starmer a friend. But Britain’s decision not to join the attacks on Iran has led to merciless mocking by the president.

dailyNews.title: Gregory Bovino’s Final Days: Harsh Words and Few Regrets
dailyNews.description: He was the face of the Trump administration’s immigration crackdown. But as he begins a retirement that was not entirely voluntary, the Border Patrol leader says he did not go far enough.

dailyNews.title: When Trump Wants Something Done, He Dispatches ICE to Do It
dailyNews.description: President Trump has increasingly used Immigration and Customs Enforcement to push personal and political objectives, and on Monday sent agents to airports across the country to help deal with long security lines.

dailyNews.title: Mullin’s Smooth Confirmation Was a Throwback in the Senate
dailyNews.description: In choosing Senator Markwayne Mullin, who has warm relationships across the Capitol and the political aisle, President Trump was reverting to a bygone tradition.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Hears Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: Trump, Who Calls Mail-in Voting ‘Cheating,’ Just Voted by Mail
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long fixated on mail-in voting to bolster his baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. But he recently used the method in a Florida special election.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on amid conflicting messages from Trump and Tehran
dailyNews.description: Trump's optimism about talks to end the Iran war has been tempered by denials from Tehran, and violence that continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz gridlocked.
